code: const DEFAULT_API_PORT='8000';export function getApiBase(){const rawBase=(process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE||'').trim();const browserHost=window.location.hostname||'localhost';const fallbackBase="http://".concat(browserHost,":").concat(DEFAULT_API_PORT);if(!rawBase){return fallbackBase;}try{const normalizedInput=rawBase.includes('://')?rawBase:"http://".concat(rawBase);const parsed=new URL(normalizedInput);const protocol=parsed.protocol&&parsed.protocol!==':'?parsed.protocol:'http:';const hostname=parsed.hostname||browserHost;const port=parsed.port||DEFAULT_API_PORT;return"".concat(protocol,"//").concat(hostname,":").concat(port);}catch(error){console.warn('Invalid REACT_APP_API_BASE value. Falling back to default API base.',error);return fallbackBase;}}export function buildApiUrl(path){const normalizedPath=path.startsWith('/')?path:"/".concat(path);return"".concat(getApiBase()).concat(normalizedPath);}
